title: VerxinaFault
description: A PVP pack that is theme of Verxina a character from Umamusume: Pretty Derby
body:
If you are a fan of Umamusume, specifically Verxina, this texture pack is just for you. I decided to make a PvP texture pack for one of my favorite characters in Umamusume. 

# About this
Verxina Fault Vanilla comes with changes in the aspects of PVP, It is designed for a better experience in during in-game combat and SMP.

**Changes**
- Lower Shield
- Particles
- Lower Fire
- Dark GUI
- Custom Totem
- Bow

![Bow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53be0dc32ac3afe7c0571ca1936d26e54ecdfc2a.png)


![Totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bb1387a02fd4b138b3c6b145d73c9437adfe3ad.png)
